title: Roasting at Multimodal
blurb: Multimodal is a roasting collective in Long Island City, Queens, offering hourly access to production-grade roasters, Cropster software, and a fully equipped lab. Founded by Paolo Maliksi and Scott Rao, it draws everyone from first-timers to green coffee exporters, with staff who guide rather than gatekeep. Learning happens by doing — surrounded by others building their craft in the same space.
